commands.review_summary:
Threads sourceReplyDeliveryMode into image/video completion wake params and changes generated-media completion prompts/tests to choose deterministic message-tool versus MEDIA-line instructions.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +78. Total +119 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. Source inspection shows the current conditional prompt, and related live context supports the duplicate-delivery failure mode, but this PR still lacks after-fix real transport proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer message-delivery review, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(agents): make media generation reply instruction deterministic based on sourceReplyDeliveryMode
target.body:
## Problem

The completion prompt for image/video generation was ambiguous:

> "Use the current visible-reply contract: if this session requires message-tool replies, call message(action=\"send\")..."

Models (especially smaller/quantized ones) often misinterpret this conditional and call the message tool for channel deliveries with raw Discord channel IDs instead of the required `channel:` prefix format. This causes repeated `"Ambiguous Discord recipient"` errors, and since the automatic delivery path also fires on each retry, the generated media gets delivered multiple times — one duplicate image per failed message-tool retry.

## Fix

Resolve `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` before building the reply instruction and make the prompt **deterministic** — no conditionals for the model to misinterpret:

- **`message_tool_only` sessions** (DMs): explicitly instruct to call `message(action="send")` and NOT use MEDIA: lines
- **`automatic` sessions** (channels/groups): explicitly instruct to use MEDIA: lines and NOT use the message tool

The delivery mode is resolved using the same logic as `deliverSubagentAnnouncement` (`resolveSourceReplyDeliveryMode` + `resolveCompletionChatType`), so the instruction is consistent with the actual delivery path chosen by the subsystem.

## Changes

- `media-generate-background-shared.ts`: `buildMediaGenerationReplyInstruction` now accepts `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` and returns deterministic instructions. `wakeMediaGenerationTaskCompletion` resolves the delivery mode before building the instruction.
- `image-generate-background.ts`, `video-generate-background.ts`: thread `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` through the completion params type.
- `media-generate-background-shared.test.ts`: tests for both delivery mode branches.

## Repro

1. Set up an OpenClaw instance with a Discord channel connection
2. Request image generation
3. Observe the model calling `message(action="send")` with `channelId: "<raw-id>"` instead of `to: "channel:<id>"` 
4. Watch "Ambiguous Discord recipient" errors repeat and duplicate images appear in channel

## Related

- #88141 — Pete's delivery path fix (merged into 2026.5.30-beta.1)
- #88323 — generated media delivery dedupe (complementary defense layer)
